data.title: Tata Motors Announces Major Restructuring and Renaming
data.description:
The latest update is out from Tata Motors Limited ( (IN:TATAMOTORS) ).

Tata Motors Limited has announced a Composite Scheme of Arrangement involving the demerger of its commercial vehicles business into TML Commercial Vehicles Limited and the amalgamation of Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Limited with Tata Motors Limited. This restructuring, effective from October 1, 2025, will result in Tata Motors Limited being renamed as Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Limited, focusing on passenger vehicles and electric vehicles, while TML Commercial Vehicles Limited will be renamed as Tata Motors Limited. The scheme is expected to impact shareholders through a share entitlement ratio and adjustments in share prices, with the new shares being listed on the BSE and NSE.

More about Tata Motors Limited

Tata Motors Limited is a prominent player in the automotive industry, primarily engaged in the manufacturing of commercial and passenger vehicles. The company is also involved in the electric vehicle sector and has investments in Jaguar Land Rover (JLR).

Average Trading Volume: 916,696

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: 2570.8B INR

For a thorough assessment of TATAMOTORS stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: 5paisa Capital Appoints New Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
data.description:
5paisa Capital Ltd. ( (IN:5PAISA) ) has shared an update.

5paisa Capital Limited has announced the appointment of Ms. Charvi Panchmatia as the new Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective October 10, 2025. Ms. Panchmatia, who brings nine years of experience in company secretarial functions, has been with 5paisa for three years and has played a key role in enhancing the company’s compliance framework. Her appointment is expected to strengthen 5paisa’s governance and regulatory adherence, benefiting stakeholders by ensuring continued compliance with regulatory mandates.

More about 5paisa Capital Ltd.

5paisa Capital Limited operates in the financial services industry, offering a range of investment and trading solutions primarily focused on retail investors. The company provides an online platform for trading in stocks, commodities, and other financial instruments, aiming to simplify investment processes for its customers.

Average Trading Volume: 3,218

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 10.99B INR

data.title: Almaviva Increases Stake in Almawave Through Share Purchase
data.description:
Almawave S.p.A. ( (IT:AIW) ) has provided an update.

Almaviva S.p.A. has executed a voluntary total public purchase offer for the shares of Almawave S.p.A., acquiring 66,235 ordinary shares, which represents 0.22% of Almawave’s share capital. This acquisition increases Almaviva’s total holdings to 76.91% of Almawave’s share capital, potentially strengthening its influence and control over Almawave’s operations and strategic direction.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:AIW) stock is a Buy with a EUR5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Almawave S.p.A. stock, see the IT:AIW Stock Forecast page.

More about Almawave S.p.A.

Almawave S.p.A. operates in the technology industry, focusing on artificial intelligence and natural language processing solutions. The company provides innovative products and services aimed at enhancing digital transformation and customer interaction across various sectors.

Average Trading Volume: 58,126

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €128.6M

data.title: Sokoman Minerals Secures $24 Million for Gold Exploration Expansion
data.description:
The latest update is out from Sokoman Minerals Corp ( (TSE:SIC) ).

Sokoman Minerals Corp. has announced a $24 million ‘bought deal’ private placement of common shares, led by Eric Sprott, an existing major shareholder. The funds raised will be used for property acquisitions, working capital, and general corporate purposes, with a portion allocated to Canadian exploration expenses that qualify as flow-through mining expenditures. This strategic move is expected to enhance Sokoman’s exploration capabilities and strengthen its position in the gold exploration industry.

Spark’s Take on TSE:SIC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:SIC is a Underperform.

Sokoman Minerals Corp’s stock is significantly impacted by weak financial performance, with substantial losses and negative cash flow posing major risks. While the company has no debt and recent strategic corporate events suggest potential improvements, technical indicators and negative valuation metrics further weigh on the stock. These factors combine to reflect a low overall stock score.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:SIC stock, click here.

More about Sokoman Minerals Corp

Sokoman Minerals Corp. is a leading explorer in Newfoundland, Canada’s emerging gold district, focusing on the Valentine Lake Fault zone. The company is primarily engaged in gold exploration through its 100% owned Treasure Island Gold Project and other gold projects, including the Fleur de Lys Project.

Average Trading Volume: 1,243,562

data.title: Solstad Offshore ASA Adjusts 2025 Financial Guidance
data.description:
Solstad Offshore ASA ( (SLOFF) ) has issued an update.

Solstad Offshore ASA has revised its financial guidance for 2025, adjusting its expected Adjusted EBITDA from USD 120-150 million to approximately USD 115 million. This adjustment reflects a reduction in the share of results from joint ventures and associated companies, which has been revised from USD 60-80 million to approximately USD 50 million, while the operational EBITDA from its own operations remains unchanged at USD 60-70 million.

More about Solstad Offshore ASA

data.title: BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC Acquires Own Shares for Treasury
data.description:
The latest update is out from BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC GBP ( (GB:THRG) ).

BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC announced the purchase of 32,000 of its own ordinary shares at an average price of 607.37 pence per share, which will be held in treasury. This transaction will result in 26.83% of the company’s total issued share capital being held in treasury, impacting the voting rights and share capital calculations for market reporting purposes.

data.title: Kidoz Inc. Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting Details
data.description:
Kidoz Inc ( (TSE:KDOZ) ) has issued an announcement.

Kidoz Inc. has announced its 2025 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders, scheduled for November 25, 2025, in Vancouver, Canada, and virtually. The meeting will cover several key agenda items, including the election of six directors, appointment of auditors, and approval of stock option and equity awards plans. This meeting is significant for stakeholders as it will shape the company’s governance and strategic direction for the coming year.

data.title: Global Hemp Group Seeks Partial Revocation Order and Announces Financing Plan
data.description:
Global Hemp ( (TSE:GHG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Global Hemp Group Inc. has applied for a partial revocation order from the British Columbia Securities Commission due to a failure-to-file cease trade order issued in April 2025. The company plans a non-brokered private placement financing to raise approximately $400,000, which will be used to cover operational expenses and outstanding document filings. This move aims to ensure business continuity and eventually lead to a full revocation of the cease trade order, allowing the resumption of trading on the Canadian Securities Exchange.

More about Global Hemp

Global Hemp Group Inc. is focused on two key business segments: Industrial Hemp and Health & Wellness (Biopharma). The Industrial Hemp division emphasizes environmental applications of hemp for construction and sustainable bio-energy, contributing to a carbon-negative footprint. The Health and Wellness Division aims to acquire exclusive licensing of patents and intellectual property. The company’s R&D Division, led by Prof. Victor M. Castaño, seeks to capitalize on opportunities in the industrial hemp sector.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$485.8K

For a thorough assessment of GHG stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
